race.comment: JASON DARREN (1) comes here in great order fifth-up and expected to go close with the visors going on. Sat on the strong tempo when nailed late to run second over 1450m at Muswellbrook in BM58 grade. Will relish Johnston's 3kg claim again and no excuses today. ZOUCRATIC (2) third-up today and ready for the 1400m. Has run on strongly at his last two outings over the 1200m. Back in class and has placed at this trip. Top-three contender. RAINBOW BLESSING (9) had mixed luck in her two runs back and assess on the slick on-pace victory over this trip at Quirindi four runs back. Value contender. PROCLIVITY (11) comes here deep into the campaign and stays in the mix despite drawing out. Stalked the speed with a game second over 1400m at Orange in C1 class. Keep safe with Braith Nock taking the reins.
